165 
OXYGN_TAKE_HOME_AMT 
LABEL: 
Medical/Surgical Supplies Oxygen Take Home Amount ($) 
DESCRIPTION: The charge amount (rounded to whole dollars) for the medical/surgical oxygen take home supplies 
related to the beneficiary's stay. 
SHORT NAME: OXYGN_TAKE_HOME_AMT 
LONG NAME: OXYGN_TAKE_HOME_AMT 
TYPE: 
NUM 
LENGTH: 
8 
SOURCE: 
MedPAR (derived) 
VALUES: 
— 
COMMENT: 
This field is derived by
